derivation_source: Blocked text-edition release decision for the tracked curated reader manuscript at evidence commit 923108ee0e15d4f6c755e060efeb0904f47dcad1. The decision covers local ignored HTML, EPUB, DOCX, PDF, and Apple Books EPUB application-review evidence only. Audio is explicitly deferred to a separate future audio_release record and is not part of this text-edition release decision.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/render_curated_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx --include-pdf; node scripts/validate_reader_html_artifact_browser.js --strict --site build/curated_reader_edition/format_artifacts/html/_reader_site --manifest build/curated_reader_edition/reader_manifest.json --report build/curated_reader_edition/curated_reader_html_browser_report.json; node scripts/validate_curated_reader_wcag_preparation.js --write-manifest
artifact_formats.notes: Rendered local curated reader HTML review tree with 49 pages, 98 of 98 browser page-view pairs passing, 20 of 20 key-figure page-view pairs passing, and tracked review digest 2ca82608207741a56a861da7d32f4d8c7e7a25dc390df3836dca11560b19ce34. Automated keyboard traversal records 98 page-view pairs, 98 skip-link activations, 98 main-content routes, and 0 keyboard-trap candidates; the keyboard-only evidence decision clears only manual_keyboard_only_review_not_completed. The accessibility-tree probe records 98 page-view pairs, 0 failures, 98 accessibility-tree page-view pairs, 0 unnamed interactive elements, 0 image alt failures, 0 table header failures, and 0 duplicate-ID hits. The automated WCAG-preparation gate records 98 page-view pairs, 0 failures, 3,523 rendered text contrast samples, 0 contrast failures, and 4.69 minimum contrast ratio, clearing only wcag_conformance_review_not_completed. Blocked: the HTML is not release-approved, not published, not screen-reader reviewed, and not third-party or legal WCAG certified.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/validate_reader_epub_apple_books_review.py; Apple Books (com.apple.iBooksX) local application review via Computer Use
artifact_formats.notes: Apple Books application review passed for repaired curated EPUB digest bca694bc97bdfbc1757d58368df9d5d3f2e6152615938a80c7eab0b2a5519255. The review opened the current local EPUB in Apple Books, rendered the Reader Edition Baseline page and chapter 1 without the earlier XML error banner, exposed the ASI Stack control-plane figure and descriptive alt text, and opened the table of contents. It clears only app_or_ereader_review_not_completed for the current repaired EPUB path. Blocked: this is not EPUB publication approval, not a full e-reader visual acceptance decision, not a reader release approval, and not an edition release approval.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: not run for this text-edition release decision
artifact_formats.notes: Audio is intentionally out of scope for this text-edition release decision. MP3, M4B, audio-embedded EPUB, pronunciation review, recorded-audio spot check, timecoded chapter markers, audio publication-rights approval, and audio release approval are deferred to a separate future audio_release record. The presence of reader text artifacts does not imply that any audio artifact exists.

review_status.notes: The tracked curated reader manuscript has 44 reconciled chapters and current local HTML, EPUB, DOCX, PDF, Apple Books, DOCX application-evidence, keyboard-only, accessibility-tree, automated WCAG-preparation, human-consumption, PDF page-by-page, and final figure-artifact release-preparation evidence. The decision remains blocked because reader release approval has not been issued and screen-reader or assistive-technology review is not complete. Audio is not required for this text-edition decision and remains a separate future release lane.

reader_manuscript.review_notes: The tracked curated reader manuscript has 44 reconciled chapter records, no missing curated chapter files, and a chapter reconciliation approval record that clears only curated_reconciliation_not_approved. The manuscript is reviewed for text-edition preparation but remains in drafting until a future approval record explicitly clears release blockers.

audio_package.review_notes: Audio is out of scope for this text-edition release decision. Existing audio-script preparation evidence does not create MP3, M4B, audio-embedded EPUB, listening-check, chapter-timecode, or audio-release approval.

companion_material.review_notes: Companion notes support reader, e-reader, and future audio preparation, but they are not standalone release artifacts and do not replace meaning-critical prose.

human_consumption_gate.notes: The human-consumption pre-release gate is passed for release preparation only. It records a coherent reader spine, ebook layout preparation, diagram/image preparation, bedtime readability preparation, and companion-note routing, but it does not approve HTML, EPUB, DOCX, PDF, e-reader, audio, or publication.

audiobook_gate.notes: Audiobook checks are not part of this text-edition release decision. They must be recorded in a separate audio_release record before any audio artifact, audiobook, or audio-embedded EPUB can be claimed.

release_notes: Blocked current text-edition release decision for the curated reader manuscript. It records current local HTML, EPUB, DOCX, PDF, and Apple Books EPUB application-review evidence from commit 923108ee0e15d4f6c755e060efeb0904f47dcad1 while explicitly deferring audio to a separate future audio_release lane. It does not approve, publish, archive, or tag any curated reader artifact.
residuals: reader_release_approval_not_created remains active; this record is explicitly partial and blocked.
screen_reader_review_not_completed remains active for the current curated reader HTML candidate.

Automated keyboard, accessibility-tree, and WCAG-preparation evidence are release-preparation evidence only; they do not perform screen-reader review, assistive-technology review, or third-party/legal WCAG certification.
Apple Books review clears only app_or_ereader_review_not_completed for the repaired EPUB digest; it does not approve EPUB publication or the full e-reader experience.
The DOCX application-evidence decision clears only docx_application_review_not_completed; Word, LibreOffice GUI, Google Docs, manual document approval, and DOCX publication approval are not claimed.
The PDF page-by-page review and PDF viewer smoke review are release-preparation evidence only and do not approve PDF publication.

Audio artifacts, audio timecodes, recorded listening checks, pronunciation review, audio publication-rights approval, and audio release approval are deferred to a separate future audio_release record.
The reader manuscript manifest must remain drafting until a future approval record explicitly clears the remaining release blockers.
non_claims: does not approve curated reader HTML, EPUB, DOCX, PDF, e-reader, audio, MP3, M4B, or audio-embedded EPUB artifacts
does not publish a reader artifact to GitHub Pages or an external archive
does not create a source tag, DOI, Zenodo archive, audiobook, or final reader release
does not perform screen-reader review, assistive-technology review, or third-party/legal WCAG certification
does not promote any chapter core claim above argument
does not prove ASI capability, model quality, deployment readiness, runtime safety, benchmark performance, source interpretation, or proof adequacy
